title: Standard Library Problem Solving · Language Clinic: Python Datetime Timezone
summary: Add time, statistics, secure identifiers, text search, process, and logging features to the data tool. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python datetime timezone increment in a standard-library operations toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use date, time, datetime, timedelta, and timezone-aware values without comparing naive and aware timestamps.
Diagnose iterator exhaustion, late exceptions, retained resources, and partial consumption with explicit probes and tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
